nasb.text: As smoke is driven away, so drive them away; As wax melts before the fire, So let the wicked perish before God.

esv.text: As smoke is driven away, so you shall drive them away; as wax melts before fire, so the wicked shall perish before God!

cnv.text: 願你把他們趕散，如同煙被風吹散一樣； 願惡人在　神面前滅亡， 好像蠟在火前熔化。

ccb.text: 愿你驱散他们， 如风把烟吹散。 愿恶人在上帝面前灭亡， 如蜡在火中熔化。

csbs.text: 他们被神吹散， 如同烟被吹散； 恶人在神面前灭亡， 如同蜡在火面前熔化。
